caption: The video features a man with a distinctive, spiky hairstyle and glasses, wearing a white shirt, gold suspenders, and a colorful bow tie. He is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logos on the screen. The man appears to be engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand while speaking. In the background, a woman with red hair, dressed in a green dress, stands holding a cup, observing the scene. The setting includes various posters and decorations on the wall, contributing to a casual yet professional atmosphere.
